meta.notes: Updated via interview with Mike. Previous version was outdated.

projects.name: Nash-AI
projects.tagline: Personal AI assistant coordinating all projects
projects.vision: A personal AI assistant running in Docker (locally first, then Hetzner VPS) that coordinates all projects, automates tasks, and provides daily briefings via Telegram and WebChat. Built on OpenClaw. The thing that unblocks everything else.
projects.definition_of_done: Agent running in Docker, Telegram connected, WebChat dashboard live, project-status.json loaded, /briefing command working, able to answer questions about all projects.

phase_plan.name: Local Docker Setup
phase_plan.description: Get OpenClaw running in Docker on Windows laptop. Telegram, WebChat, workspace, coordinator skill.

phase_plan.name: Skills & Automation
phase_plan.description: Connect project repos, Prism/ACR sandbox, automated skills.

phase_plan.name: VPS Migration
phase_plan.description: Move to Hetzner VPS with local LLM, 24/7 operation.

delegatable_tasks: Docker setup can be walked through step-by-step
Coordinator skill port
Configuration and testing
projects.notes: Top priority. Force multiplier that enables better coordination across all other projects. Doing it now.

projects.name: Nash Software Services
projects.vision: Consultancy vehicle for fractional CTO engagements, rapid MVP builds, technical audits, and automation projects. Website live and working well.
projects.definition_of_done: Pipeline of inbound leads, consistent LinkedIn content, organic traffic growing, at least one active engagement generating monthly revenue.

phase_plan.name: Website + Positioning
phase_plan.description: Next.js site with case studies, services, pricing, discovery model.

phase_plan.name: SEO & Content
phase_plan.description: SEO improvements, blog posts, drive organic traffic.

phase_plan.name: LinkedIn Strategy
phase_plan.description: Consistent posting, thought leadership, outreach.

phase_plan.name: Scale
phase_plan.description: Repeatable engagement models, potentially subcontract work.

blockers: Zero outreach happening — head scrambled across too many projects
No LinkedIn content strategy in place
SEO not optimised for organic traffic
delegatable_tasks: AI agent can draft LinkedIn posts
AI agent can run SEO audit and implement fixes
AI agent can write blog content
AI agent can prepare pitch materials
projects.notes: This pays the bills. Website is solid but no outreach is happening. Needs content, SEO, LinkedIn strategy, and traffic. Every hour not spent here has opportunity cost.

projects.name: Conductor
projects.vision: A TDE sitting between a pure CLI and a full IDE. Publicly launched on LinkedIn and GitHub under nash-software org.
projects.definition_of_done: All known bugs fixed, UI polished, notes/todos plugins updated, stable for daily use, documentation complete.

phase_plan.name: Public Beta
phase_plan.description: LinkedIn launch, GitHub public repo, initial users.

phase_plan.name: Bug Pass & Polish
phase_plan.description: Full bug report, systematic fixes, UI polish, notes/todos plugin update.

phase_plan.name: Feature Expansion
phase_plan.description: Plugin system, additional skills, community contributions.

blockers: Needs a full bug audit — no comprehensive bug report exists yet
Notes and todos plugins need updating
delegatable_tasks: Claude Code can fix bugs once bug report is documented
Claude Code can do UI polish
Claude Code can update notes/todos plugins
Claude Code can write documentation
projects.notes: 90% there. Functional but needs a polish pass. High priority because it's close to being properly shippable and builds credibility for consultancy.

projects.name: MCP Agent Tools
projects.vision: MCP server for agent task management. Should be used by all projects. First open source release for Nash Software — builds credibility and community presence.
projects.definition_of_done: Verified working in local environment, all projects using it, packaged for open source (README, license, npm package).

phase_plan.name: Build
phase_plan.description: Core MCP server built with task management tools.

phase_plan.name: Verification
phase_plan.description: Verify local environment is using it properly, test all tools.

phase_plan.name: Open Source Release
phase_plan.description: README, license, npm publish, GitHub public repo, announce.

blockers: Not fully verified in local environment yet
delegatable_tasks: Claude Code can verify integration and fix issues
Claude Code can write README and open source packaging
Claude Code can set up npm publish pipeline
projects.notes: Looks done but needs verification. First open source project — good for consultancy credibility. Everything should be using this.

projects.name: ACR Reimagined
projects.vision: Autonomous agent orchestration platform. Now under 'ACR Reimagined'. Needs Prism for cost-effective autonomous operation. Plan: test inside Nash-AI sandbox before deploying to VPS.
projects.definition_of_done: Core pipeline operational with Prism routing, tested in Nash-AI sandbox, running autonomously on VPS.

phase_plan.name: Architecture
phase_plan.description: 17-state pipeline, CQRS, Saga, Focus Groups concept.

phase_plan.name: Core Implementation
phase_plan.description: Pipeline engine built and working.

phase_plan.name: Prism Integration
phase_plan.description: Integrate Prism for token-efficient model routing.

phase_plan.name: Sandbox Testing
phase_plan.description: Test inside Nash-AI sandbox environment.

phase_plan.name: VPS Deployment
phase_plan.description: Deploy to Hetzner VPS for autonomous 24/7 operation.

blockers: Depends on Prism for cost-effective autonomous operation — will burn tokens without it
Needs Nash-AI sandbox for safe testing before VPS
delegatable_tasks: Testing and integration work once Prism is ready
Sandbox environment configuration
projects.notes: Actually working now (major change from old status). Blocked on Prism integration for cost control. The irony remains: this coordinates everything else but needs infrastructure first.

projects.name: Optimal You
projects.vision: A fitness/recovery app with body map, traffic light joint system, correlation engine. PWA deployed but core flow broken on mobile.
projects.definition_of_done: Core exercise flow working on mobile, CI/CD verified, sign-up flow complete, pre-populated plans/workouts, Jamie testing and providing feedback.

phase_plan.name: Core Build
phase_plan.description: UX redesign, body map, wireframes, schema, RLS.

phase_plan.name: Deployment & Fix
phase_plan.description: Deployed to phone but core exercise flow broken. Verify CI/CD, investigate data architecture.

phase_plan.name: Polish
phase_plan.description: Sign-up flow (images ready), pre-populate plans/workouts, bug fixes.

phase_plan.name: Jamie Testing
phase_plan.description: Jamie onboarded, feedback widget live, iterate.

phase_plan.name: Public Beta
phase_plan.description: Wider rollout, marketing, brand refresh.

blockers: Cannot start an exercise — core flow broken on mobile
CI/CD may not be deploying changes (unverified)
Data architecture around DB may be the root cause — needs investigation
Keeps saying it's fixed but it isn't
delegatable_tasks: CI/CD verification (deploy a tiny text change, check if it lands)
Data architecture investigation
Bug fixes once root cause identified
Sign-up flow implementation
Pre-populating plans and workouts
projects.notes: Frustrating state — deployed but can't complete core loop. First step: verify CI/CD with trivial change, then investigate data flow. Want Jamie testing ASAP.

projects.name: Prism
projects.vision: Routes AI requests to the optimal model based on task complexity, cost, and capability. Partially working but file operations broken. ACR depends on this.
projects.definition_of_done: File writing/editing working, stable enough for ACR integration, tested in Nash-AI sandbox.

phase_plan.name: Design
phase_plan.description: Routing logic, free-tier provider analysis.

phase_plan.name: Core Implementation
phase_plan.description: Router built and partially working.

phase_plan.name: Fix File Operations
phase_plan.description: File writing/editing bug — doc exists for this fix.

phase_plan.name: Integration
phase_plan.description: Integrate with ACR for token-efficient agent routing.

blockers: File writing/editing doesn't work — makes it practically useless
Testing locally disrupts other work — sandbox would be better
delegatable_tasks: Bug fix for file operations (doc already written)
Integration testing in sandbox
projects.notes: Much further along than old status suggested. Key blocker for ACR. File ops bug has a doc written — just needs implementing. Testing in Nash-AI sandbox preferred over local machine.

projects.name: Herald
projects.vision: Novelty desktop app — clap-activated HUD, app launcher, AI briefing. Fun idea but currently a background project.
projects.definition_of_done: Clap detection reliable (no false triggers), YouTube audio actually playing, core demo flow working end-to-end.

phase_plan.name: MVP Build
phase_plan.description: Built but has critical bugs.

phase_plan.name: Bug Fix
phase_plan.description: Fix clap sensitivity (triggers on typing/clicks) and YouTube audio playback.

phase_plan.name: Launch + Marketing
phase_plan.description: Landing page, demo videos, Gumroad, TikTok.

blockers: Clap detection too sensitive — triggers on mouse clicks and typing
YouTube audio doesn't actually play despite reporting success
delegatable_tasks: Claude Code can investigate and fix clap sensitivity
Claude Code can fix YouTube audio bug
Claude Code can build landing page
projects.notes: Fun idea, deprioritised for now. Background project — fix when there's spare time. Bugs are well-defined and delegatable.
